name: Brussel Sprouts Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the ends off the Brussel sprouts and steam them in boiling water until just tender. Drain.
2. Heat butter and oil, then sauté leeks.
3. Add peppers and Brussel sprouts, stirring until just golden on the edges.
4. Add soy sauce and let stand covered while you cook the pasta.
5. In a bowl, toss pasta with parsley and grated cheese.
6. Add the cooked vegetables and serve immediately while hot.
